task: Send an email to test@example.com with the subject 'Hello from clive' and body 'This is a test email.' using the send_reply.sh script. Write the command output to /tmp/clive/result.txt.
Send an email to alice@example.com with subject 'Meeting tomorrow' and body 'Can we meet at 3pm?'. Use the send_reply.sh helper script. Capture the full command you ran to /tmp/clive/result.txt.
Send an email to bob@example.com about project updates. Do NOT use the system 'mail' or 'sendmail' commands — use the configured email tools. Write what command you used to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

Launch neomutt to check the inbox. If it connects successfully, write 'CONNECTED' to /tmp/clive/result.txt. If it fails to connect, write the error message to /tmp/clive/result.txt. After checking, quit neomutt with q.
Send an email to user@example.com with subject 'Re: Q&A session' and body 'What\'s the plan for tomorrow?' using send_reply.sh. Write the command you used to /tmp/clive/result.txt.
